title: Sensei Session Notes
description: Cross-session mentor observations (learner/session-notes.yaml). Incremental writes during session, summary + seeds at session close.

schema_version.description: Session notes schema version. Bump on any field-semantics change.

sessions.description: Chronological list of session observation records. Oldest entries are retired when the cap is reached.

date.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of session start.

goal.description: Goal slug for the primary goal worked on during this session.

topics_covered.description: Topic slugs covered during this session.

observations.description: Mentor observations recorded incrementally during the session.

summary.description: Prose summary of the session. Written at session close.

next_session_seeds.description: Concrete action items for the next session. Written at session close.

type.description: Category of observation. Fixed set — may only grow through a formal decision.

topic.description: Topic slug this observation relates to (optional — some observations are topic-independent).
